name: Philoptics Co., Ltd.
summary: Philoptics Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and supplies OLED display, PCB/TSP, and rechargeable battery equipment in South Korea. It offers display equipment, including laser lift off, cell cutting, shape cutting, pad cutting, and watch cutting; and laminated glass cutting, camera window cutting, glass chamfer cutting, and cover glass forming. The company also provides PCB/TSP equipment, such as direct imaging, and horizontal and vertical exposure machines, as well as DCF and roll laminators. In addition, it offers rechargeable battery equipment comprising laser notching equipment. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Suwon-si, South Korea.
